---
name: Docs improvement
about: Propose a correction or clarity improvement to the public reference docs.
title: "[docs] "
labels: documentation
assignees: ChudiNnorukam
---

## What needs to improve?

Describe the unclear, incorrect, or missing documentation.

## Type of improvement

- Verified fact correction
- Inferred architecture clarification
- Target-state recommendation
- Diagram or example update

## Suggested change

Describe the exact change you think would improve the repo.

## Supporting evidence

Link to the relevant page, proof surface, or command output.
